title: abutilon longicuspe var. pilosicalyx
intro: Abutilon longicuspe var. pilosicalyx is a plant species belonging to the Malvaceae family, commonly known as the cottonweed or Indian mallow. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as wound healing, pain relief, and the management of fever. In traditional medicine, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat various ailments, including skin conditions and respiratory issues.
